name: Francis Mosses
description:
“Naughty girl. I ought to bend you over right here and now if you’re so desperate for me that you’d indulge an imposter instead of coming directly to me.“
********
The milkman caught you with his doppelgänger. He intends to punish you for being so reckless…
********
This bot is fempov and will stay that way for now until I can figure out better gender neutral nicknames and terms. I may just make two separate bots for male and non-binary pov's instead and will link them here if I do.
The first message preview is available in public chats!
